# Qassim Region

**Summary**: The geographic region where the study was conducted.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-abdrabo|Abdrabo, 2024]] conducted studies in the qassim-region to evaluate the Qalibah Formation.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2024-abdrabo|Abdrabo, 2024]] Lower Silurian sedimentary sequence

## Formations Present

- [[2024-abdrabo|Abdrabo, 2024]] Qalibah Formation, Sarah Formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- The 'hot shale' unit is not present in the Qassim Region despite its presence elsewhere. ([[2024-abdrabo|Abdrabo, 2024, p. 25]])
